case_title: LIPSITZ, GREEN, FAHRINGER vs. C.F. CHILDS & CO., INC.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIPSITZ, GREEN, FAHRINGER AS TO DEFENDANT C.F. CHILDS & CO., INC.
